'''thathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moderately|moderately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moderately|moderately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thathate|thathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thathatesher|thathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathatesherĂ«m|thathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thathatero|thathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thathateshĂ«|thathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathateshĂ«m|thathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithathatero|gokithathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithathateshĂ«|gokithathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathateshĂ«m|gokithathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothathankerom|gothathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothathankeshĂ«|gothathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathankeshĂ«m|gothathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothathankeya|gothathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thathaterom|thathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathatemu|thathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thathateya|thathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithathaterom|gokithathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathatemu|gokithathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithathateya|gokithathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thathathate|thathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thathathatesher|thathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathathatesherĂ«m|thathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thathathatero|thathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thathathateshĂ«|thathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathathateshĂ«m|thathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithathathatero|gokithathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithathathateshĂ«|gokithathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathathateshĂ«m|gokithathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothathathankerom|gothathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothathathankeshĂ«|gothathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathathankeshĂ«m|gothathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothathathankeya|gothathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thathathaterom|thathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathathatemu|thathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thathathateya|thathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithathathaterom|gokithathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathathatemu|gokithathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithathathateya|gokithathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠte|thĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠtesher|thĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠtero|thĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠthĂŠtero|gokithĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠterom|thĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠtemu|thĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠthĂŠteya|thĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠthĂŠterom|gokithĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠthĂŠteya|gokithĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafthafte|thafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafthaftesher|thafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafthaftesherĂ«m|thafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafthaftero|thafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafthafteshĂ«|thafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafthafteshĂ«m|thafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafthaftero|gokithafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafthafteshĂ«|gokithafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafthafteshĂ«m|gokithafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafthafnkerom|gothafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafthafnkeshĂ«|gothafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafthafnkeshĂ«m|gothafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafthafnkeya|gothafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafthafterom|thafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafthaftemu|thafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafthafteya|thafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafthafterom|gokithafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafthaftemu|gokithafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafthafteya|gokithafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
